event_description: A new student successfully completes OTP verification and creates an account.
A returning student successfully verifies OTP and logs in.
A new student registers via the quick-join flow without OTP verification.
A student buys a yes/no position on a binary prediction market.
A student buys a position on a multi-outcome prediction market.
An admin resolves a binary market and payouts are distributed to winners.
An admin resolves a multi-outcome market and payouts are distributed to winners.
A student redeems points for a cash or airtime reward.
A referral code is successfully applied, granting bonuses to both referrer and referred student.
A student is automatically promoted to ambassador after reaching 10 successful referrals.
An admin approves a student-submitted market proposal, making it live.
An admin creates a new binary prediction market.
